DEED OF PARTNERSHIP OF M/s. KHERIA AND COMPANY

THIS DEED OF PARTNERSHIP is made at Mumbai this 25th December, 2024 between, Neha Gourav Kheria (hereinafter referred to as "the said Neha") of the First Part, Rahul Sushil Kheria (hereinafter referred to as "the said Rahul") of the Second Part, Gourav Kheria (hereinafter referred to as "the said Gourav") of the Third Part, Rani Bajoria (hereinafter referred to as "the said Rani") of the Fourth Part, Abha Garg (hereinafter referred to as "the said Abha") of the Fifth Part, all the Indian Inhabitants of Mumbai, Bihar & Rajasthan.

WHEREAS
1. Pursuant to a Proprietorship dated 18th May 2017 the said Neha, were practicing and carrying on business as Chartered Accountants in the name and style and firm of M/s.

Signatures: 1. NehaK 2. Bkheria 3. gkheri 4. Rani Bajoria 5. AbhaGarg

Seal: KHERIA & COMPANY MUMBAI CHARTERED ACCOUNTANTS
Kheria__Company_merged_with_Page_Numbers.page_54:
Page 54 of 61

2. With effect from 08th August 2018 the said Rahul (who is a Chartered Accountant) has been admitted as partner of the said Firm on the terms and conditions herein contained.
3. With effect from 30th December 2021 the said Gourav (who is a Chartered Accountant) has been admitted as partner of the said Firm on the terms and conditions herein contained.
4. With effect from 25th December 2024 the said Rani & the said Abha (who are Chartered Accountants) have been admitted as partner of the said Firm on the terms and conditions herein contained.

NOW THIS DEED OF PARTNERSHIP DOTH HEREBY RECORD AS UNDER:

1. That the Partnership shall be deemed to have commenced with effect from the date of confirmation of Reconstitution of Firm by ICAI in the said firm name being M/s. Kheria & Company from the said premises being Office no. 513, 5th Floor, Kosha Kommmercial Komplex, Poddar Road, Behind Laxmi Narayan Shopping Centre, Malad East Mumbai 400 097.
